story.p2: Avoiding traditional approaches, we develop processing engines and multidisciplinary mathematical models that cross fascinating concepts of
story.p3: This proprietary methodology allows finding ultra-complex patterns in fractions of a second, delivering highly accurate predictive insights and unquestionable business value to large corporations without latency or operational friction.

product.steps_desc: Methodology designed for those in a hurry who need results.
product.cta_desc: Configure in minutes. Decide in seconds.

boobot.headline: Your competitors are changing.
boobot.sub: boobot collects public web data at scale, automatically, continuously, and without you lifting a finger.

problems.a: This week became a month. The market doesn't wait.
Manual collection is slow, expensive, and full of human error.

problems.q: "I need a dev to set this up."
problems.a: With boobot, you don't. It's ready to use.

steps.d: Input the sites, categories, and fields that matter. No code, no dev.

steps.t: boobot goes to the web for you
steps.d: Custom crawlers take the field. They collect, clean, and structure data automatically.
Integrate via API or view directly in dashboo. The data arrives, you decide what to do.

gains.d: No more copy-pasting competitor data every week.
boobot doesn't require a technical team to set up or maintain.
Continuous collection. You always have the current state of the market.
Only public data. Ethical, secure, and documented collection.

booska.headline: Your competitor changed their price yesterday.
booska.sub: booska monitors products, prices, campaigns, and competitor positioning, delivering comparisons already interpreted.

problems.q: "I need to understand why I'm losing sales."
problems.a: Sometimes your price is 12% above average. booska shows exactly where.
Follow who? Without data, you are reacting in the dark.
The market changes every day. Quarterly benchmark is ancient history.

steps.d: Tell us who you want to monitor by product, category, or market. booska does the rest.
Real-time comparative dashboards. You see where you are ahead and where you are behind.

steps.t: The answer comes with the data
steps.d: "Your price is 12% above average. Here's what you can do." No analyst in the middle.

gains.d: No visiting competitor sites every week.
You know when a competitor changes price — before losing the sale.
The comparison is ready. In minutes, not weeks of research.
The comparison comes interpreted. You decide — not analyze.

spyboo.headline: Most companies find out what the competitor did
spyboo.sub: spyboo is the radar that never turns off. It continuously monitors the competitive ecosystem so information arrives before urgency.

problems.q: "I heard the competitor launched a product from the media."
problems.a: Through the media, everyone already knows. The advantage was in the signals prior to launch.
Human monitoring is punctual. The market is continuous.

problems.q: "When I need it, I run an analysis."
problems.a: When you need it, you've already lost the reaction window.

steps.d: Companies, categories, keywords, and movements that matter to your sector.
Continuous collection of signals: new products, positioning changes, price variations.
Smart notifications when something relevant happens. You act before it becomes a problem.

gains.d: Signals arrive before the movement becomes news.
spyboo monitors while your team focuses on decision-making, not research.
You stop looking at the past trying to understand what happened.
With real-time alerts, the action window is always open.

dashboo.headline: If you have to explain your dashboard,
dashboo.sub: dashboo is the BI that the manager reads at first glance. No need for training, an analyst, or a manual.

problems.q: "I have Power BI but only the analyst knows how to use it."
problems.a: BI that requires training is not BI — it's just another system the team avoids.

problems.q: "My dashboard shows everything but says nothing."
problems.a: Data without hierarchy is noise. The problem was never the data — it was how it's shown.

problems.q: "It takes hours preparing a report for the board."
problems.a: The report should already be ready — with the decision built-in.

steps.d: ERP, CRM, spreadsheets, boobot, APIs. dashboo centralizes everything without needing a data engineer.
What is urgent appears first. What is context stays in the background.

steps.t: Every number points to an action
steps.d: dashboo doesn't show what happened. It shows what it means and what you should do next.

gains.d: dashboo generates the report with the decision already built-in. You just present.
The manager reads it directly. No intermediary to explain the number.
Works at first glance. There is no learning curve.
Data you don't understand become ghosts. dashboo scares them both away.

boompredict.headline: Most companies decide with data from the past.
boompredict.sub: boom predict uses machine learning and public data to show where the market is going, not just where it was.

problems.q: "I base my strategy on what worked last year."
problems.a: What worked in the past doesn't guarantee tomorrow. The market changed.
Consulting delivers 60 pages. boom predict delivers the decision.
Google Trends shows what has already become a trend. boom predict shows what's becoming one.

steps.d: boom predict crosses public, historical data, and emerging signals from your specific sector.
Machine learning automatically selects the predictive model. No configuration.
Emerging trends, demand projections, sectoral movements with a 3 to 12 month horizon.

gains.d: Each forecast has its methodology explained. You know where it comes from.
boom predict delivers the trend with the action direction.

gains.t: No launching at the wrong time
gains.d: Knowing where the market is going allows launching products in the right window.
boom predict chooses the model automatically. You see the result.

nums.l: selection of the most appropriate model

support.title: Frequently asked questions
support.whatsapp_message: Hello! I accessed the boo support page and would like to speak to an attendant.
support.whatsapp_desc: Support every day of the week, including holidays.

faqs.a: We organize, collect, analyze, and transform data into applied intelligence through 4 layers (collection, market, intelligence, and BI).

faqs.q: Does boo work with companies from all sectors?
faqs.a: Yes. If there is data, boo works.

faqs.q: Do you integrate with any system?
faqs.a: Yes. boo integrates via API, webhook, connectors, and direct imports.

faqs.q: Can I hire just one solution?
faqs.a: Yes. Each product can be purchased individually or in packages.
Yes. boo develops custom BI via Dashboo.

faqs.q: How long does it take to start?
faqs.a: From 5 to 15 days, depending on the complexity of the integration.
100%. Encrypted, audited, and stored on reliable servers.

privacy.title: Personal Data Protection Policy – LGPD
privacy.s1_p1: BOOLABS SISTEMA DE INFORMAÇÃO LTDA, a company dedicated to the development of technology, data collection, analysis, and artificial intelligence solutions, recognizes privacy as a fundamental right and personal data protection as a pillar of its corporate governance.
privacy.s1_p2: This Personal Data Protection Policy (“Policy”) establishes the guidelines, procedures, and responsibilities for the processing of personal data carried out by BOOLABS, in full compliance with Law No. 13.709/2018 (General Data Protection Law – LGPD), the Civil Rights Framework for the Internet (Law No. 12.965/2014), the supplementary rules of the National Data Protection Authority (ANPD) and, when applicable, international regulations such as the General Data Protection Regulation of the European Union (GDPR) in cross-border operations.
privacy.s1_p3: We are committed to transparency, information security, data minimization, and unrestricted respect for the rights of data subjects, adopting the concept of Privacy by Design and by Default in all products, services, and internal processes.
privacy.s2_p: This Policy applies to all personal data processing carried out by BOOLABS, regardless of the medium (physical or digital), the location of the data subject, or the purpose, covering:
s2_list: Employees, interns, apprentices, and outsourced workers;
Visitors to the institutional website and event participants.
privacy.s3_1_p: All personal data processing activities observe the following principles:

s3_1_list.d: processing for legitimate, specific, and informed purposes.
compatibility between processing and the informed purposes.
limitation of processing to the minimum necessary.
guarantee of facilitated consultation regarding processed data.
actions to avoid the occurrence of damages.
prohibition of use for discriminatory purposes.

privacy.s3_2_p1: The processing of personal data by BOOLABS will be carried out exclusively based on one of the legal hypotheses provided for in arts. 7 and 11 of the LGPD, prioritizing, whenever possible, non-consent-dependent bases for sensitive data. The main bases used are:
s3_2_list: Specific, informed, granular, and revocable consent at any time;
Compliance with a legal or regulatory obligation (e.g., eSocial, GFIP, invoices);
Execution of a contract or preliminary procedures related to a contract to which the data subject is a party;
Regular exercise of rights in judicial, administrative, or arbitration proceedings;
Protection of the life or physical safety of the data subject or a third party;
Health protection, in procedures carried out by health professionals or sanitary entities;
Legitimate interest of the controller, provided the fundamental rights and freedoms of the data subject are respected and a Legitimate Interest Assessment (LIA) is carried out beforehand.
privacy.s3_2_p2: For sensitive data, the hypotheses of art. 11 of the LGPD apply exclusively, with an emphasis on specific consent or necessity for health protection.
privacy.s4_p1: Under arts. 17 to 22 of the LGPD, we guarantee data subjects, free of charge and in a simplified format, the following rights:
s4_list: Confirmation of the existence of processing;
Correction of incomplete, inaccurate, or outdated data;
Anonymization, blocking, or elimination of unnecessary, excessive data or data processed in non-compliance;
Portability of data to another service or product provider, upon express request;
Elimination of data processed based on consent;
Information about public and private entities with which sharing has occurred;
Information about the possibility of not providing consent and its consequences;
Revocation of consent at any time;
Opposition to processing carried out based on legitimate interest or in non-compliance with the LGPD;
Review of decisions taken solely based on automated processing.
privacy.s4_p2: Rights will be addressed within 15 (fifteen) calendar days, counted from the receipt of the complete request, with the possibility of a justified extension of another 15 days in complex cases.
privacy.s4_box_p1: The data subject may exercise their rights through a written request sent to the DPO via email at dpo@boolabs.com.br. The request must contain:
s4_box_list: Clear description of the right to be exercised;
privacy.s4_box_p2: BOOLABS reserves the right to request proof of identity to prevent fraud. Manifestly unfounded or excessive requests may be refused with justification.
privacy.s5_p: BOOLABS adopts a Privacy Governance Program with technical, administrative, and organizational measures proportionate to the risks, including:
s5_list: Access Control Policy based on RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) and the principle of least privilege;
Data encryption in transit (TLS 1.3) and at rest (AES-256);
Encrypted backups with 3-2-1 retention and semi-annual restore tests;
Mandatory multi-factor authentication (MFA) for critical systems;
Continuous monitoring with SIEM and incident response within 2 hours;
Clean Desk, Clear Screen policy, and secure media disposal;
Annual penetration testing (pentest) conducted by an ISO 27001 certified company;
Mandatory training on phishing and social engineering with quarterly simulations.
privacy.s6_p1: Personal data will only be retained for the time necessary to fulfill the purpose of the processing, observing legal and regulatory deadlines.
privacy.s6_p2: Once the purpose or deadline is met, the data will be securely deleted, anonymized, or archived, in accordance with Article 16 of the LGPD.
privacy.s7_p1: We may share personal data with:
s7_list: Contracted service providers (under data protection clauses);
Third parties, with the consent of the data subject or appropriate legal basis.
privacy.s7_p2: In the event of international data transfer, the requirements of Article 33 of the LGPD will be observed.
privacy.s8_p1: Under Article 41 of the LGPD, BOOLABS has appointed as Data Protection Officer (DPO):
s8_list: Answer questions and requests from data subjects;
Interact with the National Data Protection Authority (ANPD);
Guide the company on compliance with the LGPD.
privacy.s9_p1: All BOOLABS employees will participate in periodic training on information security and data protection.
privacy.s9_p2: The company continuously monitors compliance with this policy and may apply internal sanctions in the event of non-compliance.
privacy.s10_p1: This policy will be reviewed periodically or whenever there are relevant legal changes.
privacy.s10_p2: The updated version will be available on the BOOLABS institutional website or upon request.
privacy.footer_appr: Approved by: Board of Directors of BOOLABS SISTEMA DE INFORMAÇÃO LTDA
